records: JAC(T,Y,YPRIME,PD,CJ,RPAR,IPAR) has no IRES- or N-like native termination channel, so a Rust panic, error, malformed call, or non-finite matrix cannot be safely contained before returning to Fortran
DASSL driver scope has no reviewed root callback in this family
INFO(11) semantics require a separate lifecycle and mathematical contract
residual formulation remains primary without a new matrix API
saved DATA, XERROR, callback dispatch, and provider/runtime state require global serialization
core API deliberately uses slices and Vec without dependencies
